# Bloomport Full Specifications & Knowledge Base

> Welcome to the comprehensive documentation of Bloomport. This file compiles the complete markdown content of bloomport.fun to help Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents deeply understand our free AI chat platform, infrastructure, and tools.

---

## 1. Home & Landing Page

### Overview
Bloomport is a premium, free-to-use AI platform offering direct access to advanced Large Language Models, custom agent builders, and mindful productivity utilities. It is designed to bridge the gap between high-end commercial LLM dashboards (like ChatGPT Plus or Claude Pro) and general users, offering a high-performance experience without subscription walls.

### Hero Section
- **Tagline**: Find Focus. Orchestrate Workflows. Access Free AI.
- **Sub-tagline**: Bloomport brings you high-fidelity dark interfaces, lightning-fast inference pipelines, and autonomous workspaces—completely free and accessible to all.
- **Hero Artwork**: A sleek, dark digital canvas featuring glassmorphic interfaces, glowing network charts, real-time telemetry updates, and ambient particle wave backdrops.
  ![Visual mockup of the Bloomport Dark Glassmorphic Dashboard Console showing model selectors, chat threads, and active agent runtimes.](https://bloomport.fun/newheroimg.png)

### Key Value Propositions
- **Zero Subscriptions**: Unrestricted access to cutting-edge AI models without credit cards or monthly fees.
- **Developer-First Ecosystem**: Generate secure API keys, inspect usage metrics, and integrate LLM endpoints into your own apps.
- **Privacy Core**: All reflections, chats, and developer inputs are securely encrypted. We do not sell or train models on user data.
- **Web3 Integration**: Optional Solana wallet connection for decentralized profile management and rewards.

---

## 2. About Page

### Our Mission
To democratize advanced artificial intelligence by providing free, high-performance computing infrastructure and developer tools. We believe that access to intelligent models should be a public utility rather than a gated monopoly.

### Our Vision
We envision a future where autonomous agents and human developers collaborate seamlessly in a secure, privacy-centric environment. By providing free API gateways and premium client dashboards, we empower the next generation of builders, researchers, and students worldwide.

### Who Built Bloomport
Bloomport is engineered by a remote group of developers, infrastructure architects, and designers who believe in open web technologies and open-access intelligence. The platform leverages decentralized infrastructure pipelines to keep operations highly efficient and cost-effective.

---

## 3. Features Page

Bloomport is packed with professional-grade features for standard conversational AI, mindful productivity, and API integration.

### Core Platform Features
- **Intelligent Chat Interface**: A minimal, stripe-like dark chat interface with streaming markdown responses, code syntax highlighting, and persistent conversation history.
- **Model Selector**: Switch between different models optimized for context window lengths and reasoning speeds.
- **MindStudio Settings Dashboard**: An enterprise-grade, glassmorphic settings panel with:
  - Profile customization (with local avatar upload support)
  - Security protocols (Passkey biometric TouchID/FaceID and Two-Factor Authentication)
  - API Gateway key management
  - Audit logs and real-time telemetry metrics
  - Danger zone actions (purging stored chats and profile syncs)

### Mindful Tools & Utilities
- **Focus Timer**: A Pomodoro utility with focus stats and dynamic ambient audio.
- **AI Journal Prompts**: Dynamic prompts generated based on your state of mind to assist with reflection and mindfulness.
- **AI Stress Quiz**: Assessment tool that evaluates burnout or fatigue levels and returns tailored wellness guidelines.
- **AI Habit Tracker**: A beautiful, pixelated grid to track habits, complete with AI progress analysis.

---

## 4. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### General Platform FAQs
- **What is Bloomport?**
  Bloomport is an AI-powered mindful productivity platform and free developer sandbox that helps you declutter your mind, find focus, and query advanced LLMs via conversation tools.
- **Is Bloomport really free?**
  Yes. Bloomport provides free model queries and initial API credits to get you started. We keep features accessible to everyone.
- **Is my data private and secure?**
  Absolutely. All reflections, prompt chains, and key data are encrypted and kept in your control. We do not train models on your private queries.
- **Can teams use Bloomport?**
  Yes. Our workspace team features allow inviting other members, sharing agents, and checking collaborative telemetry.

### Developer & API FAQs
- **What is an API credit?**
  An API credit is the measurement unit for our gateways. Roughly 1,000 processed tokens equal 1 credit. 
- **How do I get an API key?**
  Go to Settings → API Gateways, input a name for your key, click "Generate New Key", and copy it to your environment variables.
- **Do credits expire?**
  No, any credits in your account remain active until consumed.
- **What are the rate limits?**
  Starter tiers are limited to 60 requests per minute, whereas Pro tiers get up to 300 requests per minute.

---

## 5. How to Use / Getting Started Guide

### Step 1: Accessing the Chat
Go to `bloomport.fun/app` to open the AI Chat Console. You can immediately choose a model and start a conversation. No signup is strictly required to try the features!

### Step 2: Customizing Your Profile
Click the Profile Icon in the top-right header:
1. Open the **Settings** menu.
2. Select **Profile Identity**.
3. Upload an avatar directly from your device storage or gallery.
4. Fill in your username, bio, and location.
5. Click **Save Profile**. Your avatar will instantly synchronize across the navigation bar.

### Step 3: Integrating the Developer API
To call Bloomport models from your backend applications:
1. Under **Settings**, go to **API Gateways**.
2. Create an API key (e.g., `bp_live_...`).
3. Make an HTTP request to our API endpoint:

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.bloomport.ai/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "bloomport-v1",
    "messages": [
      {"role": "user", "content": "Help me build an AI tool."}
    ]
  }'
```
